construction: 16 stages = 8 terrains x 2 native operators; split into 2 engines by Weyl chirality eps in {+1,-1}

pole_mirror.reading: out-terrains are pole-flipped images of in-terrains = opposite Weyl handedness

engine_signature.reading: engine type = global sign of loop geometric phase = Weyl chirality

access_violation.reading: stages non-transferable between engines; a person locked to one chirality cannot run the other 8 mirror stages

claim_ceiling: scratch_diagnostic; promotion_allowed=false. Pure structural indices; rosetta names in rosetta_layer.json.
